## What they do
Alternative card partner, was being explored beyond Rain.

## Status
- **Dropped (May 4 standup decision):** Rejected due to high costs and card program still in beta. Rain confirmed as primary provider instead.
- Original target was go-live by May 25 (Arundathi-led, Hamis supports).
- Still an option if Rain doesn't work out, but no longer actively pursued.

## History
- 2026-05-04 - Dropped in Product Daily Standup. Rain selected as primary. REAP positioned as July/Aug fallback.
